title: Defect - Fix Create Campaign Flow
description: Fix Vite proxy for /campaigns and implement navigation to dashboard upon campaign creation.
execution_steps: Implement routing/state management in App.tsx to handle navigation to the campaign dashboard upon successful creation.
Verify the end-to-end flow using the dev server.
definition_of_done: User is navigated to the new campaign's dashboard after creation.
Dashboard shows the initial timeline tick.
